title: Rhea Seehorn Favored to Win Lead Actress at Golden Globes and Critics Choice Awards for 'Pluribus'
text: According to Gold Derby's predictions, Rhea Seehorn is heavily favored to win Best Drama Actress at the 2026 awards. Current odds showed Seehorn at 96.1% (listed as favorite), followed by Britt Lower ("Severance") at 9.3%, Kathy Bates ("Matlock") at 2.4%, Keri Russell ("The Diplomat") at 1.4%, and Carrie Coon ("The Gilded Age") at 0.3%. The article notes that Seehorn carries much of the Apple TV+ series, with "many scenes where Carol is alone, mourning humanity or investigating" her character's situation. Her performance has garnered significant critical acclaim, helping "Pluribus" achieve a "98 percent at Rotten Tomatoes and an 87 score at Metacritic." While Seehorn previously earned three Critics Choice nominations for "Better Call Saul," this awards bid represents a significant opportunity for her to break through in major categories.
